overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district. The player character walks along city sidewalks, crosses an intersection, and passes various holographic billboards and storefronts in a futuristic urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large curved holographic billboard displaying a woman with purple neon text reading FEEL THE BEAT
orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane street
concrete wall covered in blue and white graffiti tags
various illuminated signs and advertisements along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark cyberpunk city street at night, walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers. A massive purple holographic billboard dominates the right side of the view, while graffiti-covered walls and neon storefront signs line the street. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow grid crosswalk

events.description: transitioning from enclosed sidewalk to open intersection with visible crosswalk
crossing the multi-lane street via the yellow grid crosswalk as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the marked crosswalk, navigating between traffic barriers

notable_agents.action: white van driving down the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: red illuminated sign with white text reading Market mounted on a pole
broad intersection marked with yellow grid lines and striped crosswalk patterns
tall pole with traffic signals and attached signage
high-rise building facade covered with multiple vertical illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the character steps onto the yellow grid crosswalk. A red Market sign stands prominently on the left while tall buildings covered in vertical billboards rise in the distance. The character crosses the street, passing traffic lights and navigating around vehicles, transitioning from the commercial block to the opposite side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with vending machines and construction barriers

events.description: passing a brightly lit yellow and blue vending machine on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past a vending machine and approaching a pedestrian in red pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing red pants and white cap walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall yellow and blue automated vending machine with illuminated product display and advertisement
temporary construction barrier painted green with graffiti tags
long white fluorescent light fixtures mounted under building overhangs
rack with magazines and newspapers displayed on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a quieter sidewalk section featuring a prominent yellow vending machine and green construction walls covered in graffiti. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the path while a pedestrian in distinctive red pants walks ahead. The environment feels more enclosed as tall buildings line both sides of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a vibrant street corner into a wide intersection and finally into a more enclosed urban corridor. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers, passing beneath a massive purple holographic billboard and graffiti-covered walls. As the character reaches the edge of the block, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses a yellow grid crosswalk past a prominent red Market sign and towering vertical billboards. The movement then shifts toward the opposite side of the street, transitioning from the open traffic area back onto a quieter sidewalk. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera passes a yellow vending machine and green construction walls under the glow of overhead fluorescent lights.
